seoTitle: Mount Druitt vs Mount Elliot — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Druitt and Mount Elliot. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Druitt vs Mount Elliot: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Druitt and Mount Elliot.
heading: Mount Druitt vs Mount Elliot — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Druitt, New South Wales and Mount Elliot, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Elliot has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Mount Druitt (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Druitt or Mount Elliot safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Druitt has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Mount Elliot scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Druitt scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Elliot scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Druitt or Mount Elliot?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Elliot has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
